message:
web: Add admin-only transcript download endpoints

Add two new API endpoints for admins to view raw transcript data:
- /api/admin/transcript-unified/:id - returns unified JSON transcript
- /api/admin/transcript-raw/:id - returns raw JSONL transcript

Both endpoints verify admin role before serving content. Buttons added
to the debug section in the transcript detail view.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/gxsgbulg3ry167inyh6b0x4n
